Date: The date when the data was reported or updated.
Distinct_Charging_Station_Models_Tested: The number of distinct charging station models tested by Elexion Automotive's quality assurance team.
CCS_Protocol_Versions_Tested: The number of Combined Charging System (CCS) protocol versions tested by Elexion Automotive's quality assurance team.
Level2_Charger_Configurations_Tested: The number of Level 2 charger configurations tested by Elexion Automotive's quality assurance team.
Planned_Charging_Scenarios_Next_Year: The number of charging scenarios that Elexion Automotive's quality assurance team plans to test in the following year.
